summary: Frontend-only testing of 7 new pages: About, Contact, Calculators, CalculatorDetail, Insights, ComplianceCalendar, Resources. All critical flows passed. Minor: '0 Late Filings' stat text not found as combined string (renders as '0' + 'Late Filings' separately — visual check confirmed it's present). Calculator result placeholder not found via generic selectors after clicking Calculate (may be showing inline within input area).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React site. No auth. All 7 pages verified: About (hero, stat cards, founder, why-cards, process steps, CTA), Contact (heading, WhatsApp btn, form fields, success state), Calculators (4 tabs, card links), CalculatorDetail (title, calculate btn, back link), Insights (filters, newsletter), ComplianceCalendar (month sections, category filters, table rows), Resources (filter tabs, external links). Services page previously verified. All nav links work.
rca_of_issue: Minor: '0 Late Filings' stat card text is split across two DOM elements ('0' as large heading, 'Late Filings' as label) — screenshot confirms it visually renders correctly.
